name: Open Scout MCP Server — One-Pagers & Boards
what_it_does: MCP server for Open Scout — enables AI agents to create and publish one-pagers and boards for organizations. Agents can upload images from URLs, build structured content boards, and publish shareable one-page documents — useful for project summaries, status updates, and organizational communication.
use_cases: Creating project summary one-pagers from documentation agents
Publishing status update boards for team communication from project management agents
Building organizational knowledge boards from content curation agents
Generating and sharing structured visual summaries from AI research agents
not_for: Full document editing suites (one-pager/board publishing focus)
Private internal wikis requiring access control
best_when: A team or organization wants AI agents to create and publish concise visual summaries, project boards, or one-pagers — turning agent-generated content into shareable web documents.
avoid_when: You need a full CMS or wiki. Open Scout is for lightweight, shareable one-pagers and boards, not comprehensive documentation platforms.

auth.notes: Open Scout account required. Published boards are shareable links. Verify visibility settings before publishing organizational content.

pricing.notes: Emerging publishing service — pricing not publicly documented.

known_agent_gotchas: Published boards may be publicly accessible — verify privacy settings before publishing
Agents may inadvertently publish confidential content as public one-pagers
Image upload from URLs pulls external content — verify image URLs are stable and licensed
Emerging service with limited track record — validate reliability before production use
One-pager layout control may be limited for complex content
agent_readiness.security_notes: Published content may be publicly accessible. Agents must verify privacy settings before publishing. Organizational content requires appropriate visibility controls.

security_score_components.security_notes: Published boards risk public exposure of confidential content. Visibility settings critical. Image URL content fetched from external sources.
